The trivia sources mention "The Lion King" (animal in title) and allude to Oscar wins, but do not provide nomination lists, director/writer roles, or birthplaces. No evidence was found for a mythological creature-titled film matching all other criteria. Therefore, I agree with Agents 1, 2, and 3: there is insufficient evidence to determine the exact category and year.
Exact Answer: Insufficient evidence to determine the exact category and year.
